# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
def score(age, frequency, recency, size, cache_size, now):
    # Higher score = keep. 
    # 1. Raw frequency rewards stable popularity (stable_frequency_hitrate).
    # 2. (recency / age) provides a relative age penalty. 
    #    Recent accesses boost score, but the effect diminishes as the item ages.
    #    This handles churn (old items get penalized heavily) and temporal locality
    #    (recently accessed items get a boost regardless of total age).
    return frequency + (recency / (age + 1))
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
